_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to pay attention to different kinds of stories and books and explore them.

_source.w: We are learning to pay attention to different kinds of stories and books and explore them.
y: Exploring many different texts helps us find ones we enjoy.
Handling books and stories helps us learn how they work.
The more we explore, the more confident we become with stories.
eg: We pick up different books from the classroom library and feel their pages.
We choose a book to look at from a selection of different shapes and sizes.
We explore a thick book and a thin book and notice how they are different.
We touch a textured book and feel the bumpy pictures.
We turn the pages of a picture book on our own.
We look at a digital story on a tablet and tap the screen.
